carrot.label: Carrot
carrot.description: A fresh carrot. Restores a small amount of HP.

pizza.label: Pizza
pizza.description: The kind of pizza those turtles living underground used to love.

terminal_bentobox.label: Terminal Handmade Bento
terminal_bentobox.description: Warm rice and pickled vegetables. It gives you a boost of energy.

roasted_nut_mix.label: Roasted Nut Pouch
roasted_nut_mix.description: Savory nuts roasted directly over a small brazier.

filtered_honey_tea.label: Purified Honey Tea
filtered_honey_tea.description: Helps relieve fatigue and restore Mana (MP).

premium_vodka.label: Premium Vodka
premium_vodka.description: A strong spirit scavenged from a bar.

tainted_core.label: Tainted Core
tainted_core.description: The core of an aberration dwelling in the depths.

potion_small.label: Small Health Potion
potion_small.description: A minor recovery potion. Restores 20 HP.

mana_potion_small.label: Small Mana Potion
mana_potion_small.description: A minor mana recovery potion. Restores 20 MP.

potion_medium.label: Medium Health Potion
potion_medium.description: A standard-issue potion for security personnel. Restores 100 HP.

mana_potion_medium.label: Medium Mana Potion
mana_potion_medium.description: A potion that replenishes spiritual energy. Restores 80 MP.

nano_medical_kit.label: Nano Medkit
nano_medical_kit.description: An advanced medical kit used by Security Priests. Restores 180 HP.

potion_large.label: Large Health Potion
potion_large.description: A powerful recovery potion. Restores 250 HP.

wood_stick.label: Wooden Stick
wood_stick.description: A plain stick found rolling around on the street.

rags.label: Rags
rags.description: Scraps of cloth from the deceased found on the ground.

iron_sword.label: Iron Sword
iron_sword.description: A sturdy sword forged from iron. Increases Attack and provides a slight Critical Hit chance.

leather_armor.label: Leather Armor
leather_armor.description: Armor made from lightweight leather. Slightly increases Defense and Evasion.

nut.label: Acorn
nut.description: A small, nutritious acorn. Restores a very tiny amount of HP.

heavy_wrench.label: Heavy Wrench
heavy_wrench.description: A massive tool once used for repairing cranes. Heavier than an iron sword, but offers solid impact and critical potential.

terminal_halberd.label: Terminal Guard's Halberd
terminal_halberd.description: A polearm used by loading dock watchers. Its sharp blade ensures stable damage.

reinforced_vest.label: Reinforced Workwear
reinforced_vest.description: Clothing made of thick canvas reinforced with thin iron plates. Sturdier than leather armor with decent mobility.

reaper_chain_mail.label: Reaper Chainmail
reaper_chain_mail.description: Armor woven from black metal rings. Extremely heavy, but deflects most attacks with ease.

resistance_mace.label: Utility Mace
resistance_mace.description: A track-breaking hammer modified for combat.

improvised_bayonet.label: Improvised Gun
improvised_bayonet.description: It has a short range, but it still fires properly for now.

scavenged_mantle.label: Resistance Mantle
scavenged_mantle.description: A mantle made of dark fabric, perfect for hiding in the shadows.

rebel_iron_plate.label: Rebel Breastplate
rebel_iron_plate.description: An iron plate ripped from a shipping container and strapped to the chest.

ratman_dagger.label: Ratman's Rusty Dagger
ratman_dagger.description: A rusty blade with zero maintenance. It stings more than expected, as if the wounds might fester.

sharp_pipe.label: Sharp Pipe
sharp_pipe.description: A drainage pipe from the loading dock, sharpened to a point. Good for light ambush attacks.

sewer_leather_vest.label: Sewer Leather Vest
sewer_leather_vest.description: A leather vest reeking of damp sewers. Unpleasant, but lightweight and easy to move in.

stolen_helmet.label: Stolen Hard Hat
stolen_helmet.description: A helmet scavenged by Ratmen from the guard's warehouse. Dented, but enough to protect your head.

golem_core_staff.label: Iron Guardian's Overload Staff
golem_core_staff.description: A massive staff extracted from the drive unit of a fallen Iron Golem. Unstable current still flows from the core, sending hums and vibrations through the wrist with every swing.

security_baton.label: Security Baton
security_baton.description: A standard-issue baton used by bio-guards. Sturdy but crude.

cold_touch_dagger.label: Dagger of Cold Touch
cold_touch_dagger.description: A dagger imbued with the chilling aura of a Phantom Thief. Delivers a bone-chilling sensation.

priest_rosary.label: Security Priest's Rosary
priest_rosary.description: A rosary with a built-in nanite controller. Emits weak holy shockwaves.

standard_security_vest.label: Standard Security Vest
standard_security_vest.description: The common vest worn by Terminal security personnel.

hard_steel_plate.label: Hardened Steel Plate
hard_steel_plate.description: A fragment of an Automaton's armor. Extremely heavy, but provides absolute defense.

phantom_cloth.label: Wraith's Cloth
phantom_cloth.description: The hem of a phantom with no clear physical form. Possesses a mysterious power to let physical strikes slip through.

stolen_jewelry.label: Stolen Jewelry Box
stolen_jewelry.description: Valuable jewels stolen by a master thief. Can be sold for a high price at shops.

noble_seal_ring.label: Noble's Seal Ring
noble_seal_ring.description: A symbol of authority once worn by a corrupt noble medium.

optical_lens.label: Optical Lens
optical_lens.description: A precision lens that once served as the eye for a unit.

security_kevlar_vest.label: Security Kevlar Vest
security_kevlar_vest.description: A bulletproof vest for security officers. Lightweight and durable for easy movement.

optical_carbine.label: Optical Carbine
optical_carbine.description: A precision firearm incorporating lens technology from surveillance units. Offers very stable accuracy.

wraith_soul_staff.label: Wraith Soul Staff
wraith_soul_staff.description: A staff infused with phantom ectoplasm. Emits mana and an unpleasant scream with every swing.

caron_staff.label: Charon's Staff
caron_staff.description: The staff favored by Charon. You can feel a power that warps space itself.

luxury_shoes.label: Blood-Stained Shoes
luxury_shoes.description: Stained with blood; no chance of reselling these for a premium price.

small_pistol.label: Small Pistol
small_pistol.description: Small in size, but seems decent enough for self-defense.
